content.cn_text: 现在翻到第3页第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to Section 2 on page 3.

content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位女士在广播节目中介绍一个即将举行的节日。
content.en_text: You will hear a woman talking on a radio program about a festival that is about to take place.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第3页的第11至18题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 11 to 18 on page 3.

content.cn_text: 今天在演播室里和我一起的是来自 Yorktown Tourism 的 Mary Smith，她将向我们介绍未来三周在我们州首府春季节期间举行的一些活动。
content.en_text: I have in the studio with me Mary Smith from Yorktown Tourism, who is here to tell us about some of the events happening in our state capital over the next three weeks at the Spring Festival.

content.cn_text: 那么 Mary，我们可以期待看到什么呢？
content.en_text: So Mary, what can we expect to see?

content.cn_text: 嗯，这是在 Yorktown 的一个非常令人兴奋的时刻。
content.en_text: Well, it's such an exciting time to be in Yorktown.

content.cn_text: 为了拉开春季节的序幕，本周六9月4日晚上9点，将在湖边举行大型烟花表演。
content.en_text: To kick off the Spring Festival, there will be a huge firework display down by the lake starting at 9pm this Saturday the 4th of September.

content.cn_text: 届时将燃放超过10000枚烟花，全部配合音乐编排，并在 Radio Yorkie 同步播出。
content.en_text: Over 10,000 fireworks will be set off, all choreographed to music and broadcast simultaneously here on Radio Yorkie.

content.cn_text: 如果你想靠近现场，就应该早点到。
content.en_text: You should get there early if you want to get close to the action.

content.cn_text: 所以带上野餐和毯子，因为晚上可能会变冷。
content.en_text: So bring along a picnic and a blanket as it could get chilly in the evening.

content.cn_text: 吸引全国各地游客来到节日的一大亮点，是整个节日期间在 Central Park 展出的精彩花卉收藏。
content.en_text: One of the things that attracts visitors to the festival from all over the country is the amazing collection of flowers on show in Central Park throughout the festival.

content.cn_text: 对于喜欢乘坐公共交通的人，专线巴士将每20分钟从镇中心开往展会。
content.en_text: Special buses will run from the town centre to the show at 20 minute intervals for those of you who prefer to take public transport.

content.cn_text: 如果你对从最快到最昂贵的最新汽车感兴趣，那就去 Exhibition Centre 参观9月10日至15日举行的汽车展。
content.en_text: If you're interested in seeing the latest in cars from the fastest to the most expensive, then head over to the Motor Show at the Exhibition Centre from the 10th to the 15th of September.

content.cn_text: 它每天从上午9点开放到晚上10点，所以你甚至可以下班后过去看看。
content.en_text: It'll be open daily from 9am until 10pm, so you can even pop there after work.

content.cn_text: 你喜欢摄影吗？那就去看 Grow Your Imagination，这是一个著名花园摄影展，将于9月11日至19日在美术馆举行。
content.en_text: Do you like photography? Then go along to Grow Your Imagination, an exhibition of photographs of famous gardens which will be held at the art gallery from the 11th to the 19th of September.

content.cn_text: 来这里，从世界上一些最美丽的花园中获得灵感。
content.en_text: Come and be inspired by some of the world's most beautiful gardens.

content.cn_text: 我已经提前看过其中一些照片，它们非常壮观。
content.en_text: I've had a sneak preview of some of the photographs and they are magnificent.

content.cn_text: 如果你更喜欢音乐，那你应该来听澳大利亚爱乐乐团在9月17日星期五和9月18日星期六于音乐厅演出的 Swing in Spring。
content.en_text: If music is more your scene, then you should come and hear the Australian Philharmonic Orchestra performing Swing in Spring at the concert hall on Friday the 17th and Saturday the 18th of September.

content.cn_text: 这是对20世纪40年代和50年代舞曲的庆祝。
content.en_text: It's a celebration of dance music from the 1940s and 50s.

content.cn_text: 共有三场演出，两个晚场都在晚上7点开始，星期六还有一场下午2:30的日场演出。
content.en_text: There'll be three performances, both evenings start at 7pm and a matinee performance at 2.30 on the Saturday.

content.cn_text: 所以穿上你的舞鞋去那里吧。它一定会让你忍不住跟着节奏动起来。
content.en_text: So get your dancing shoes on and head there. It's guaranteed to get your feet tapping.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余节目之前，你有一些时间查看第4页的第19和20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the program, you have some time to look at questions 19 and 20 on page 4.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第19和20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 19 and 20.

content.cn_text: 这些只是部分可参与的活动。如果你想尝试一点不同的，可以参加 Balloons Down Under，这是南半球最大的热气球聚会。
content.en_text: Those are just a few of the attractions on offer but for something a little different you could try Balloons Down Under which is the largest gathering of hot air balloons in the southern hemisphere.

content.cn_text: 这非常值得，因为现场会有超过25个各种形状和大小的热气球，景象真的很壮观。
content.en_text: It's well worth it because there'll be over 25 balloons of all shapes and sizes which is a truly amazing sight.

content.cn_text: 我也很高兴宣布，一位幸运者将有机会免费乘坐其中一个热气球升空。
content.en_text: I'm also happy to announce that one lucky person will get the chance to go up in one of these balloons absolutely free.

content.cn_text: 这就是我们春季节特别竞赛的奖品。通常这要花200美元，所以这个奖品不错吧？
content.en_text: That's the prize in our special spring festival competition. It would normally cost you $200 so it's not a bad prize, eh?

content.cn_text: 我相信你们都想有机会中奖，所以你们需要填写今天这期Yorktown News 里的参赛表格。
content.en_text: I'm sure you all want a chance to win so you'll need to fill out the entry form in today's edition of the Yorktown News.

content.cn_text: 别忘了写上你的电话号码，并把它寄到 Radio Yorkie。
content.en_text: Don't forget to include your phone number and send it to Radio Yorkie.

content.cn_text: 确保你的参赛表格在9月9日星期四下午5点前送达我们这里。
content.en_text: Make sure your entry reaches us by 5pm on Thursday 9th September.

content.cn_text: 然后，如果想看看自己是否中奖，只需在9月11日星期六查看节日网站，我们会在那里公布幸运获奖者的名字。
content.en_text: Then to see if you've won, just check out the festival's website on Saturday 11th September where we'll publish the name of the lucky winner.

content.cn_text: 这是一个非常棒的奖品，所以赶快提交参赛表格吧。
content.en_text: It's such a fantastic prize so hurry up and get your entry in.

content.cn_text: 以上就是春季节期间在 Yorktown 举行的部分特别活动。
content.en_text: So there you have it, just a few of the special events happening here in Yorktown over the Spring Festival.

content.cn_text: 如果你想了解更多关于节日的详情。
content.en_text: And if you'd like any more details about the festival.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Question 11–18

items.title: Near the 11. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问烟花表演地点 near the ______，原文说 down by the lake，因此答案是 lake。

items.title: Pack a 12. ________ and blanket
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问要带什么和 blanket，原文说 bring along a picnic and a blanket，因此答案是 picnic。

items.title: Display of 13. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问 Central Park 展示什么，原文说 collection of flowers on show，因此答案是 flowers。

items.title: Buses run from the town centre every 14. ________ minutes
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问巴士每多少分钟一班，原文说 20 minute intervals，因此答案是 20。

items.title: The 15. ________ Show
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 The ______ Show，原文说 Motor Show，因此答案是 motor。

items.title: in the 16. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问 Grow Your Imagination 在哪里举行，原文说 held at the art gallery，因此答案是 art gallery。

items.title: in the 17. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Swing in Spring 在哪里举行，原文说 at the concert hall，因此答案是 concert hall。

items.title: Saturday matinee performance at 18. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Saturday matinee performance 的时间，原文说 at 2.30 on the Saturday，因此答案是 2.30 / 2:30。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Spring Festival

content: Buses run from the town centre every $14$ minutes

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Question 19 and 20

items.title: In the Spring Festival competition, you can win

options.title: A
options.content: a family pass to ‘Balloons Down Under’

options.title: C
options.content: a flight in a hot air balloon

items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问春季节竞赛可以赢得什么，原文说 chance to go up in one of these balloons absolutely free，对应 C “a flight in a hot air balloon”。

items.title: You can get an entry form for the competition from
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问从哪里获得参赛表格，原文说 entry form in today’s edition of the Yorktown News，即报纸，对应 B。
